title: seattle — seattle-departure-2026-06-29
author: Ken Baker (InTheWake)
description: Elliott Bay departure scene from a cruise ship leaving Seattle: MSC Poesia berthed at left near the grain terminal, the downtown Seattle skyline and Space Needle at centre, and the departing ship's wake in the foreground. Photographed by Ken Baker, 2026-06-29.
via: owner-provided (Ken Baker, photographed in person at Seattle, 2026-06-29)
